scripts.db:init: node -e "require('better-sqlite3')('prisma/main.db',{});require('better-sqlite3')('prisma/web.db',{});process.exit(0)" && npx prisma db push --config prisma/prisma-main.config.ts --force-reset && npx prisma db push --config prisma/prisma-web.config.ts --force-reset
scripts.db:clear: Remove-Item prisma/main.db -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item prisma/web.db -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm run db:init
scripts.db:seed: npx tsx prisma/seed-main.ts && npx tsx prisma/seed-web.ts
scripts.db:reset: npm run db:clear && npm run db:seed
